title: westringia lucida
intro: Westringia lucida, also known as the shiny coastal rosemary, is a perennial shrub native to Australia, characterized by its silvery-gray foliage and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to combat infections, reduce pain and swelling, and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Westringia lucida include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. Westringia lucida can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in conjunction with other herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
